notes: Deletes standalone auth service, auth SDK packages, auth app image, and related manifests/workflow references.
Removes `session_id` fields and same-origin auth plumbing from models, routes, tests, docs, and SDKs.
Deletes internal result-update route and worker callback config/HTTP logic.
Collapses large `openapi.py` mutation logic and most operation-id registry scaffolding.
Moves duplicated middleware/error glue into one shared pure-ASGI implementation.
Deletes sync-over-async event-loop helpers and threadpool bridge indirection.
Deletes `@nova/sdk-fetch` and materially shrinks TypeScript generator/output complexity.
Shrinks `generate_python_clients.py` and associated output patching substantially.
Replaces bespoke R runtime layers with thin httr2-oriented code.
Deletes auth-service infra and simplifies deployment topology and runbooks.
Prunes stale workflows, docs, manifests, and release scripts after earlier cuts.
